cast.name: 弗兰西斯·巴贝 Frances Barber
默里·麦克阿瑟 Murray McArthur

director.name: Philip Clayton Smith Philip Clayton Smith

introduction: My Irish horror A Hand to Hold premiered at Telluride Horror Show in October 2025. The film is now an official selection at the 41st Santa Barbara International Film Festival 2026, FrightFest 2026, Glasgow Film Festival 2026, Landshut Short Film Festival 2026 and Six Feet Under Film Festival 2026.In this graphic, creature-horror comedy, Frances Barber (Mr. Holmes) plays an elderly woman who finds herself literally attached to her deceased husband, Murray McArthur (How to Train Your Dragon). When his hand refuses to let go after death, it leads to increasingly grotesque events.
